message:
Add state/timeline compression and lifecycle tests (70.5% → 73.5%)

18 tests for TimelinePersister: CompressTimeline, CompressOldTimelines
(with disabled/skip-already-compressed variants), LoadTimeline from
compressed .gz, readHeader on compressed and empty files, ListTimelines
(empty/non-jsonl/includes-compressed), DeleteTimeline compressed,
StopCheckpoint, countUniqueAgents, getTimelinePath, Cleanup edge case.

Key coverage improvements:
- CompressOldTimelines: 0% → 84.6%
- compressTimeline: 0% → 73.7%
- StopCheckpoint: 0% → 100%
- readHeader: 55.6% → 83.3%
- LoadTimeline: 78% → 90.2%

Ref: bd-2mm23

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
